line: - Added shared CLI/session snapshot utilities in `src/cmd/common.rs`

items: Added shared CLI/session snapshot utilities in `src/cmd/common.rs`

line: - The previous failure mode was a compile blocker in `src/cmd/watch.rs` tests (`guard: None` vs `Vec<PathBuf>`); fixing that first unblocked the rest of Phase 3 work.

items: The previous failure mode was a compile blocker in `src/cmd/watch.rs` tests (`guard: None` vs `Vec<PathBuf>`); fixing that first unblocked the rest of Phase 3 work.

line: - A concrete one-test probe was enough to reveal baseline breakage before expanding scope.

items: A concrete one-test probe was enough to reveal baseline breakage before expanding scope.

line: - `saw status --json` works even with no live local session by returning a `Dead` snapshot instead of crashing.

items: `saw status --json` works even with no live local session by returning a `Dead` snapshot instead of crashing.

line: - Synthetic hook verification via stdin is a fast proof path for hook mode without needing a live Claude hook roundtrip.

items: Synthetic hook verification via stdin is a fast proof path for hook mode without needing a live Claude hook roundtrip.

line: - Chose a thin implementation path: hook events persist to `.saw/hooks/<session>.jsonl` and are merged into snapshots, instead of building a Unix socket daemon first.

items: Chose a thin implementation path: hook events persist to `.saw/hooks/<session>.jsonl` and are merged into snapshots, instead of building a Unix socket daemon first.

line: - Kept TUI minimal but functional: poll-based dashboard with ratatui, status/file/metrics/alerts panels, and key actions `q`, `k`, `K`, `c`.

items: Kept TUI minimal but functional: poll-based dashboard with ratatui, status/file/metrics/alerts panels, and key actions `q`, `k`, `K`, `c`.

line: - Implemented robot output on `watch` as structured JSON snapshots/events rather than a fully streamed daemon protocol.

items: Implemented robot output on `watch` as structured JSON snapshots/events rather than a fully streamed daemon protocol.

line: - Hook transport is file-backed, not Unix-socket-backed as originally envisioned in `PLAN.md`.

items: Hook transport is file-backed, not Unix-socket-backed as originally envisioned in `PLAN.md`.

line: - `saw status` currently exits `1` with a valid JSON `Dead` snapshot when no active session is detected.

items: `saw status` currently exits `1` with a valid JSON `Dead` snapshot when no active session is detected.

line: - Phase 3 bead children in `.beads/issues.jsonl` still appear open; code is implemented, but bead status metadata was not updated.

items: Phase 3 bead children in `.beads/issues.jsonl` still appear open; code is implemented, but bead status metadata was not updated.
